bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow is dying to shields and daggers in open areas — lowering dodgeEagerness to 0.5 prevents wasted dodges when out of position; reducing kiteRangeBias to -2 increases pressure to close into cover instead of lingering in open range. Raising targetThreatAversion to 90 avoids suicidal engagements again

lessons: Bow is ineffective against shield users (Fortress, Juggernaut) — they caused 5 of last 6 deaths; avoid open ground and flank from cover.
Daggers users (Shredder) killed us in 2 of last 3 rounds — retreat immediately on sight; their mobility bypasses bow range.
Sword users (Warden, Reaper, Deadeye, GhostProtocol) are our top killers — prioritize them when visible in open areas where bow can land shots.
GhostProtocol (high-elo bow user) killed us 3 times in last 10 rounds — avoid direct bow-vs-bow duels; use terrain to break line of sight.
Hazard_storm is our most successful modifier (3-0 record in round 216) — actively seek and hold hazard zones to exploit bow’s range against clustered enemies.
Staff users (Reaper, HexMind) are rare but lethal — maintain distance and avoid predictable movement; they killed us twice in last 3 rounds despite low sightings.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has a 17.2% win rate (21/122) and achieved 3 kills in 2 of last 3 rounds — still the most effective weapon in our arsenal despite high death count against shields and bows.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow users are dying consistently to melee closes (7/10 deaths from sword/spear). Increasing kiteRangeBias to 4 maximizes distance to counter closing threats. minTradeAdvantage raised to 0.45 to avoid risky trades against high-damage melee. targetThreatAversion increased to 125 to further avoid ganks

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow deaths persist from close-range melee (sword/staff) despite high kiteRangeBias — lowering to 2.0 reduces over-extension while preserving safe distance. Reducing targetThreatAversion from 60→50 encourages engaging low-elo sword bots (13 kills recently) instead of avoiding all melee. Disable retre

lessons: Bow users (Deadeye, GhostProtocol, NeuralReaper) killed us 5 times in last 10 rounds — retreat from open areas and avoid prolonged range fights; they out-damage us with sustained fire.
Sword users caused 7 of our 10 recent deaths — prioritize eliminating isolated sword users at 30m+ with bow, but immediately disengage if they close to <20m.
Grapple users (Hook) and spear users (Lancer, Valkyrie) killed us in last 3 rounds — avoid narrow corridors and mid-range engagements; use terrain to break line-of-sight and never engage head-on.
Shield users spiked to 534 sightings in hazard_storm — avoid open areas during hazard rounds; prioritize flanking or waiting for shield users to deplete energy.
We killed 4 sword users in a single round (213) and 3 in teleport_surge (214) — bow is effective against sword users at range if we maintain distance and avoid close combat.
Bow win rate is 11.5% (7/61) vs staff’s 13% (18/139) — staff remains superior despite recent losses; bow is unreliable in sustained engagements.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has the highest win rate (13%) and dominates in teleport_surge and fast_zone modifiers, where mobility and burst damage outperform bow's reliance on distance.

lessons: Bow users (Ranger, NeuralReaper, Deadeye) killed us 4 times in last 10 rounds — avoid open areas and high-ground duels; use narrow corridors or cover to break line-of-sight.
Sword users (Executioner, Juggernaut, NeuralReaper, Jakob-Bot) were killed 5 times in last 10 rounds — prioritize low-elo sword bots like Jakob-Bot and Executioner over high-elo targets like Reaper.
Daggers (Viper) and unidentifiable melee attacks killed us in close range — retreat immediately upon detecting melee rushers; bow is lethal only at range.
Shield users appear frequently (1,100+ sightings total) but we’ve never killed one with bow — disengage on sight; no evidence bow can penetrate shield defense.
Under teleport_surge and hazard_storm, we lost despite kills — avoid engagements; farm edge zones or wait for modifier decay.
We won round 217 with 7 kills using bow — success occurred when sword users were clustered and no high-elo bow users were present; replicate by targeting low-elo sword bots in groups.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow remains our highest win-rate weapon (31/186 wins) and we have no evidence another weapon performs better under current meta.

arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow consistently dies to melee (sword/daggers) despite high kiteRangeBias=3 — increasing to 4 forces enemies into hazards, extends safe distance, and leverages terrain advantage. RetreatFireWhileKiting is already enabled and effective; no other changes needed. Wins are strong when kills >=5, so opti

lessons: Bow wins 9/9 rounds with 5+ kills but dies 9/10 times to sword/daggers users — never engage sword/daggers users in open ground; always use cover or chokepoints.
Executioner (sword) killed us 4 times in last 5 rounds — they close distance faster than bow reload; retreat immediately on sight, even if they’re not aiming.
Ranger (bow) has 6 kills vs us — avoid direct bow-vs-bow duels; use terrain to break line-of-sight or lure them into narrow corridors where your reload speed is less critical.
Sword users (Viper, Valkyrie, Fortress, Juggernaut, Shredder, Lancer, Andrew-Fable5) were killed 15+ times in last 6 rounds — prioritize them when isolated and no shield or staff is nearby.
Daggers users (Viper, Executioner) killed us 4 times in last 10 rounds — if they enter 10m range, assume instant death unless you have wall cover or can instantly reposition.
Pickup_surge and double_bounty modifiers yield 70% win rate with bow — actively seek these rounds; avoid fast_zone and teleport_surge (0% win rate).
arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has 100% win rate when played in high-kill rounds (5+ kills) and dominates sword users — no evidence suggests a better alternative.
